emails.body: Re: Austin LM6000 Scope of supply We need to finish up with the site specific agreement for the equipment, then they can have the whole enchilada. I would think it could be ready in a week. I'll get A K to dust it off. Kay From: Stuart Zisman@ECT on 02/06/2001 11:04 AM
